createWorkspaceHint: Create a workspace to get started.
createWorkspacePrompt: Enter a name for the new workspace
moveFreshHelp: Re-extract triples from scratch instead of reusing the destination's existing entities.
moveReconcileBanner: After the move, this page's entities will be reconciled with the destination's existing vocabulary.
moveFreshBanner: Fresh extraction selected — every entity in this page will be re-created without reusing the destination's vocabulary.
deleteConfirmWithChildren: Move '{{title}}' and its {{count}} child page(s) to the trash. They will be permanently deleted after 30 days; until then you can restore them.
deleteConfirmNoChildren: Move '{{title}}' to the trash. It will be permanently deleted after 30 days; until then you can restore it.
publishedBlockMessage: Take the public URL offline first, then delete the page safely. Unpublish and delete now?
folderDeleteBlocked: Can't delete '{{name}}' — move its contents first.
moveCycle: A node cannot be moved inside itself.
trashDescription: Deleted pages are kept for 30 days and can be restored at any time.
permanentlyDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete '{{title}}'. This cannot be undone. Continue?
